posts.author: kruz (Tom Kruz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone . How to control the visibility of certain data like scores by adjusting the permissions within your Monday.com workspace? Such i have KPI board and This was created ,but we want to make it so that the team members cannot see the actual scores yet
Can you figure out how to do that?
